stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP 698 file 4.31.
Given the following information, determine the advised cooling schedule and minimum brake cooling time after landing for the following performance data:

Landing Mass: 100 000 lb
VREF: 138 kt
Correction to VREF for landing speed: (VREF – 3 kt)
Corrections to VREF for wind component: minus 50% of a headwind or plus 150% for a tailwind
Pressure Altitude: 984 ft
OAT: +25⁰C
Breaking configuration: Auto Brake 2
Reverse thrust: Normal Reverse #2 detent
Taxi miles: 4 NM
Take into consideration 50 kt Headwind.
Add one million foot-pounds for each taxi mile to obtain total energy.

options.b: Cooling II required, 18 minutes ground cooling before take-off.
options.c: Cooling ll required, 40 minutes ground cooling before take-off.
options.d: Cooling III required and NO special cooling procedure required.
